name: Kashmir Classic
description: The traditional Kashmir circuit. Srinagar as your base, day trips to the three valley gems. Houseboats, gondolas, pony rides, and the most beautiful valley on Earth.
logistics: Fly into Srinagar. Hire a local driver for the whole trip — it's affordable (₹2,500-3,500/day) and they know the roads. Don't self-drive unless you're comfortable with mountain roads.

day_by_day.plan: Arrive, check into houseboat on Dal Lake. Evening shikara ride. Explore Mughal gardens if energy permits.
Full day Srinagar: Shankaracharya Hill sunrise, Mughal Gardens (Shalimar, Nishat, Chashme Shahi), Old City walk, Hazratbal.
Day trip Gulmarg. Gondola Phase 1 (must do). Phase 2 only if weather is clear and no small kids. Khilanmarg walk. Return evening.
Drive to Pahalgam. Check in. Afternoon: Betaab Valley, Aru Valley. Pony rides for kids. Lidder river walk.
Full day Pahalgam. Baisaran meadow (pony ride up). Chandanwari if time. Or just relax by the Lidder.
Drive to Sonamarg via Srinagar. Thajiwas Glacier walk (easy, 2km). Lunch at Sonamarg. Return to Srinagar evening.
Morning: Dal Lake flower market by shikara (early AM). Shopping at Lal Chowk. Depart.

name: Kinnaur-Spiti Circuit
description: The classic Himachal loop: through Kinnaur's apple valleys into Spiti's cold desert, exiting via Kunzum and Rohtang to Manali. Only possible when both routes are open (roughly mid-June to mid-October).
logistics: Start from Shimla or Chandigarh. 4WD recommended for Spiti section. Carry 20L extra fuel. 2 full driving days each side. Acclimatize at Kalpa/Nako before climbing to Kaza.

day_by_day.plan: Drive via Narkanda, Rampur. Stop at Sarahan's Bhimakali Temple. Overnight Sarahan.
Drive to Kalpa via Reckong Peo. Kinner Kailash view from Kalpa. Apple orchards. Acclimatize (2960m).
Drive to Sangla Valley. Visit Kamru Fort, Sangla. Continue to Chitkul. 'Last dhaba'. Overnight Chitkul.
Return to NH5, continue toward Spiti. Stop at Nako village and lake. Monastery visit. Overnight Nako (3662m).
Drive to Tabo. Visit 1000-year-old Tabo Monastery (the Ajanta of Spiti). Cave hermitages. Overnight Tabo.
Stop at Dhankar Monastery + lake hike. Arrive Kaza. Rest and explore Kaza market. Overnight Kaza (3800m).
Day trip: Key Monastery → Kibber → Chicham bridge → Langza (fossils) → Hikkim (post office) → Komic. Return Kaza.
Drive to Chandratal via Losar and Kunzum Pass. Camp at Chandratal. Milky Way at night.
Drive over Kunzum Pass toward Manali side. Stop at Sissu waterfall and lake. Overnight Sissu/Keylong.
Through Atal Tunnel to Manali. Old Manali cafes. Trip ends.

name: Ladakh via Manali
description: The legendary Manali-Leh highway. 474km, 5 passes, 2 days of driving through some of the most dramatic landscape on Earth. Then Nubra dunes, Pangong blue, and monastery circuits.
logistics: Manali-Leh highway open Jun-Sep only (sometimes late May). Fuel up at Tandi (last pump before Leh). Carry extra 30L fuel. ILP needed for Nubra/Pangong (get in Leh). 2 days acclimatization in Leh is NON-NEGOTIABLE.

day_by_day.plan: Through Atal Tunnel to Keylong, continue to Jispa. Night halt. Easy day — save energy for tomorrow.
The big day. Baralacha La (4890m), Gata Loops, Lachalung La, Pang, Moore Plains, Tanglang La (5328m), Upshi, Leh. Start early 4AM.
ACCLIMATIZE. Do NOT exert. Walk gently around Leh town, Shanti Stupa, market. Drink 3+ liters water. Light food.
Day 2 acclimatization. Thiksey Monastery (mini Potala), Shey Palace, Hemis. All at 3500m, manageable now.
Over Khardung La (5359m) to Nubra Valley. Diskit Monastery. Hunder sand dunes + double-hump camels. Overnight Hunder.
Drive to Turtuk — last Indian village before Pakistan. Balti culture, apricot orchards, Tyakshi hamlet. Return Hunder.
Nubra to Pangong via Shyok road (adventurous) or back via Leh (safer). Arrive Pangong. That blue. Overnight Spangmik.
Sunrise at Pangong. Return to Leh via Chang La (5360m). Rest in Leh.
Monastery circuit: Lamayuru (moonland), Alchi (1000yr murals), Likir. Or Hemis if missed.
Free day. Leh Old Town, Hall of Fame museum, shopping. Prepare for return.
Return Manali highway. Same route, different direction — you'll notice things you missed.
Jispa to Manali via Atal Tunnel. Trip ends.

name: Rajasthan Royal Circuit + Desert
description: The grand Rajasthan loop: Pink City to Blue City to Golden City to Lake City. Forts, palaces, deserts, and the best food trail in India.
logistics: Fly into Delhi or Jaipur. Fly out of Udaipur. Hire a driver (₹2,000-3,000/day) or use trains between cities. Oct-Feb is the ONLY window — summer heat is 45°C+.

day_by_day.plan: Drive or train to Jaipur. Afternoon: Hawa Mahal, City Palace. Evening: Nahargarh Fort sunset.
Amber Fort (morning, go early). Jaigarh Fort cannon. Afternoon: Jantar Mantar, Albert Hall Museum. Johari Bazaar shopping.
Drive to Pushkar via Ajmer. Brahma Temple, Pushkar Lake sunset, camel market area. Overnight Pushkar.
Drive to Jodhpur. Afternoon: Mehrangarh Fort (jaw-dropping). Blue City walk below the fort. Stepwell. Overnight Jodhpur.
Drive to Jaisalmer through Thar Desert. Arrive afternoon. Jaisalmer Fort walk (living fort!). Sunset from fort walls.
Morning: Patwon ki Haveli, Gadisar Lake. Afternoon: drive to Sam Sand Dunes. Camel safari. Desert camping under stars.
Return to Jodhpur (or fly). Overnight Jodhpur. Toorji ka Jhalra stepwell, local food trail.
Drive to Udaipur via Ranakpur Jain Temple (stop, it's worth it). Arrive Udaipur evening. Lake Pichola views.
City Palace, Jag Mandir boat ride, Fateh Sagar Lake, Sajjangarh (Monsoon Palace) sunset. Rooftop dinner.
Morning: Saheliyon ki Bari garden. Depart from Udaipur airport.

name: HP Family Easy
description: The classic Himachal family circuit. Shimla's toy train, Manali's snow, Dharamshala's monks. All on good roads, all with proper hotels and hospitals. Safe, comfortable, memorable.
logistics: Fly into Chandigarh. Hire a driver for the whole trip or take HRTC Volvos between cities. All roads are well-maintained national/state highways.

day_by_day.plan: Drive to Shimla. Toy train from Kalka if time (book ahead). Evening Mall Road walk. Overnight Shimla.
Drive to Manali via Kullu. Long day but scenic. Settle into Old Manali or Naggar. Evening walk.
Hadimba Temple, Solang Valley (paragliding/snow depending on season), Atal Tunnel day trip to Sissu if time.
Old Manali cafes, Vashisht hot springs, Naggar Castle + Roerich Gallery. Relaxed day.
Drive to McLeod Ganj via Mandi-Jogindernagar-Palampur. Settle in. Evening Tsuglagkhang Complex.
Bhagsu Waterfall, Namgyal Monastery, Norbulingka Institute (30min drive down). Tibetan food trail.
Drive back to Chandigarh for departure. Or fly from Gaggal airport if available.

name: HP Offbeat Villages
description: The Himachal that tourists miss. River valleys, ancient tower forts, apple orchards, the last village in India. No Mall Roads, no traffic jams — just mountains and quiet.
logistics: Start from Chandigarh. Own car or hired driver essential — public transport is sparse. Roads are narrow but paved. Not for monsoon travel.

day_by_day.plan: Drive to Gushaini via Aut tunnel turn-off. Check into riverside homestay. Evening by the river.
Jalori Pass drive, Serolsar Lake walk (2km flat). Afternoon: Chehni Kothi hike or river time.
Jibhi village, waterfall walks, Shoja. Or GHNP buffer zone nature walk. Trout fishing if licensed.
Drive via Aut back to NH5, continue to Karcham, turn into Sangla Valley. Kamru Fort. Overnight Sangla.
Drive to Chitkul. Walk to Baspa river, Mathi Devi temple, last dhaba. Soak in the end-of-road feeling. Overnight Chitkul.
Return to Karcham, continue to Reckong Peo and up to Kalpa. Evening: Kinner Kailash sunset view.
Sarahan Bhimakali Temple day trip. Or Kalpa village walk, apple orchards, monastery.
Drive back via Rampur, Narkanda to Shimla or Chandigarh. Long drive — start early.

name: Spiritual North India
description: The spiritual spine of North India: Mughal grandeur, Krishna's playground, Shiva's city, the holy confluence, and the yoga capital. All on the plains — no mountains, no altitude, all accessible.
logistics: All cities connected by train (India's best rail network). Shatabdi/Vande Bharat express trains are fast and comfortable. Or hire a car for the whole loop.

day_by_day.plan: Train or drive to Agra. Taj Mahal afternoon visit (less crowded than morning). Mehtab Bagh sunset view of Taj.
Agra Fort morning. Drive to Fatehpur Sikri (stop, 1hr). Continue to Vrindavan. Prem Mandir light show evening.
Banke Bihari Temple (morning). Krishna Janmabhoomi Mathura. Evening train to Varanasi (Vande Bharat, 6hrs).
Sunrise boat ride on Ganga. Walk the ghats: Dashashwamedh, Manikarnika. Evening: Ganga Aarti (arrive 30min early for spot).
Sarnath (where Buddha gave first sermon). BHU campus. Ramnagar Fort. Lassi at Blue Lassi Shop. Varanasi street food trail.
Train/drive to Prayagraj. Triveni Sangam boat ride (confluence of Ganga-Yamuna-Saraswati). Anand Bhawan. Overnight.
Train to Haridwar (6-7hrs). Transfer to Rishikesh. Settle in Laxman Jhula area. Evening aarti at Triveni Ghat.
White-water rafting Shivpuri-Rishikesh (16km, Grade 3). Afternoon: Beatles Ashram. Neelkanth Mahadev if time.
Yoga session morning. Drive to Haridwar. Har Ki Pauri, Mansa Devi cable car. Evening: Haridwar Ganga Aarti (massive, moving).
Shatabdi Express back to Delhi. Or drive. Trip ends.
